frontmatter.title: July 11, 2026
frontmatter.description: A Saturday night at Lebanon Valley Speedway — Big Block Modifieds, Twin 20s, and a fireworks show over the dirt track.

photos.alt: Family at Lebanon Valley Speedway watching the races from the grandstands
photos.caption: The kids taking in their first dirt track race.

photos.alt: Race cars on the dirt track at Lebanon Valley Speedway under the lights
photos.caption: The Modifieds lining up under the lights before the feature.

photos.alt: Night sky over Lebanon Valley Speedway grandstand and dirt track
photos.caption: Under the lights at Lebanon Valley.

photos.alt: Wide view of the dirt oval and grandstand at Lebanon Valley Speedway
photos.caption: The full track panorama from the grandstand.

photos.alt: Action on the dirt track at Lebanon Valley Speedway
photos.caption: Cars rounding the high banks.

photos.alt: Race action at Lebanon Valley Speedway under the night lights
photos.caption: Charging through the corner under the lights.

videos.alt: Big Block Modifieds racing side by side on the dirt oval at Lebanon Valley Speedway
